title: The Plan to Strike Big Mom
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Capone Bege, Caesar Clown, Brook, Big Mom, Bege as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not too interested in pulling off the assassination of big mom myself, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is big mom even the sort of person that'll die to guns or cannons?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As far as my first impression of her goes, she seems like an iron balloon! I doubt we can even put a scratch on her.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed. If we're really going to pull off an "assassination," we've gotta finish her off in an instant.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: or we'll get surrounded and killed instead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yonkou really are something else, aren't they?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course! She's a monster! We almost died just trying to get brook back from her while she was sleeping!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Right you are!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Which makes it all the more puzzling that you'd choose to carry out this plan at her tea party, where all her strong underlings will be gathered as well!

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: What say you, Bege?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: An honest question. Can't blame ya.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Here's the answer.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Assuming certain conditions are met, I can take big mom's head in 5 seconds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just 5 seconds?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Creating a 5 second opening at that tea party is no small task-rero.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: After even an instant, someone, most probably

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of the commanders is gonna be at your throat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if that happens, it's an all-out battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A battle we have exactly O chance of winning!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kuku- Ku...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This assassination plot starts with ensuring Caesar's cooperation.

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: It's Gastino, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you dare call me Caesar in front of big mom! Not even by mistake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once this plot is over, you're going to give me back my heart and set me free!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's our agreement! Don't forget it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Or I promise you; I'll come for your son's life!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Shuro- Roro! GeHo- Gahoo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare you even worry about that, gas-tiny! Bage keeps his promises!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Gas-Tiny?! It's Gastino!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ahaha- Hahahaha! Gas-tiny!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who cares what we call him? He's still trash.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In any case, this guy's job is pretty important.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed! Shuroro- roro! This shall be my job!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The deadly poison gas bullet, the KX launcher!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: one's more than enough, and we've got 3!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Each cartridge directly delivers 5 grams of toxic organophosphosphosphostate poison* directly to the body!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AN ABSOLUTELY GODLESS WEAPON OF SLAUGHTER! DIE! DIE, YOU FOOLS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I see. Now it makes sense.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we've got weapons that we know will kill her; we just gotta make sure we hit her?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Sadly, not exactly.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That cartridge won't be able to penetrate big mom's tough skin when she's Hale and hearty.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There ain't many weapons in this world that can!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What?! So what are we gonna do?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are two conditions that need to be met for this KX launcher to work properly!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One! Ensuring that all present are, for at least 5 minutes, unable to prevent me from firing the thing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And two! That Mama's body is sufficiently weakened!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The hell is with those overly convenient conditions?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those overly convenient conditions can only be met

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: At the tea party!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ffgggy AaaAA AHHHHHHHHHHHH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Awwww! I'm sowing, baby! :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Daddy spoke too would, didn't he? Daddy's sowny!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, it's been close to a year since we joined big mom's crew. And she just doesn't get hurt!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When she's wrecking the town, or when she's sinking ships, or even when she eats direct gun- or canonfire...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her tough- as-nails body simply doesn't suffer as much as a scratch!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She really is an iron balloon, as you said!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 56 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
